unexpected_finds.title: Second n=4 quad-witness fire in bridge history; cascade 123 §3.2 aggregation rule extends cleanly to n=4 for second consecutive time
unexpected_finds.description: S154 is the second n=4 quad-witness fire in bridge history (first was S153 at 4761392 on the same day, 2026-05-10). The aggregation rule from cascade 123 §3.2 (most-conservative LABEL + most-conservative BAND), extended to n=4 per cascade 130R §6.3, extended cleanly to n=4 for the second consecutive time without modification. This now constitutes n=2 evidence for the rule's stability at n=4, suggesting it can be promoted from cascade-130R-extension to a general n>=4 rule without further accommodation.
unexpected_finds.candidate_memory_status: PROMOTION_RECOMMENDED to general n-witness aggregation rule (n>=2 covered by 123/127R/130R; n=4 now covered by S153+S154)

unexpected_finds.title: Unanimous Q2b t2b M11 anchor concordance across 4 independent witnesses
unexpected_finds.description: All 4 independent witnesses (Gemini / Grok / Claude / GPT-5.5) independently selected the t2b degree-(2,1) Trans-stratum paper (Zenodo 19915689 / concept 19783311) as the optimal M11 arXiv endorsement anchor. This is the strongest concordance signal in the S154 packet. Three witnesses surfaced t2a as the secondary candidate. The unanimity across 4 providers (Google/xAI/Anthropic/OpenAI) suggests t2b's math.NT alignment + numerical density profile is robust to provider-specific reasoning style.
unexpected_finds.implication: operator can fire M11 endorsement on t2b with high confidence post-Zenodo-cascade-stabilization

unexpected_finds.title: Unanimous Q3c AI Position desk-reject risk concordance across 4 independent witnesses
unexpected_finds.description: All 4 independent witnesses (Gemini / Grok / Claude / GPT-5.5) independently identified the AI Peer Review Founding Position paper (Item 7) as the highest desk-reject risk in the M12 4-paper cadence, and unanimously placed it last in the recommended submission ordering. The AFM 8-minute desk-reject pattern (existing repo memory) is referenced explicitly by W2 Grok. Mitigations converge: aggressive jargon-stripping; meta-science venue selection (NOT pure math journals); abstract-first epistemological framing.
unexpected_finds.implication: Item 7 must be deferred to last position in M12 cadence; venue selection requires non-math-journal target

unexpected_finds.title: Convergent 5-amendment union across 4 witnesses with no contradictory amendment surface
unexpected_finds.description: Despite witness LABEL divergence (3 RECOMMENDATION + 1 RECOMMENDATION_WITH_AMENDMENT), the 5 aggregated amendments (union of W1+W3+W4) form a consistent monotone-additive set with no contradictions. This suggests the action ladder has reached structural convergence: any further synth fires would likely re-derive the same amendment set without producing genuinely new structural recommendations. Diminishing-returns signal for further T1-Synth consultation on this scope.
unexpected_finds.implication: no further T1-Synth fires recommended for post-closure action ladder; operator-decision tier is the next bottleneck
